title: Hurtborder
description: The barrier expands as the player takes damage.
body:
# ![Hurtborder](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3d27946e08fb472af33d0d3e39798ad388756124.png)
## The barrier expands as the player takes damage. (READ THIS!)
## How to install?
1. Download the datapack `.zip` file.  
2. Create new world and click **More/Data Packs**
3. Click **Open Pack Folder** and place the downloaded `.zip` file into opened folder.  
4. Create your world.  
5. Run `/trigger start` in chat to activate the border.  
6. You’re done! The datapack is now installed and ready to use.
## Functions
- After starting a game, the world border is set to **1x1 block**, centered on the player’s spawn point.  
- Every time the player takes damage, the datapack checks the lost health and increases the border size.  
- Expansion ratio: **1 HP (half a heart) = +0.5 block** to the world border.  
- The border always grows evenly in all directions from its center.
- Don't worry about the datapack incompatibility message, because it has been tested on all versions listed in the version file.
